same_side_method.method: Sort approved CL-003 open segments by minimum x; split at the unique largest positive horizontal gap between adjacent segment ranges; assign the lower-x group to source fields named left_source_pixel and the higher-x group to source fields named right_source_pixel.
same_side_method.authority_claim: same-panel deterministic interpretation classification only; not a center, axis, or physical correspondence

traces.selection_method: unique minimum same-panel Euclidean distance after deterministic same-side split
traces.containment_claim: none; unfilled line crosses only an explicitly unowned interpretation gap and creates no source-owned region
traces.component_crossing_claim: none; no mask, fill, or surface authority inferred
